fields.useCase: Real-time claims fraud detection at FNOL (first notice of loss)
fields.cloudProvider: Azure (primary); on-prem VMware for the legacy claims core
fields.stackNotes: Guidewire ClaimCenter on-prem; policy admin on Azure; data warehouse on Synapse refreshed nightly. No streaming layer today.
fields.cloudCapNotes: Mature Azure landing zone with Entra ID and Key Vault. Azure OpenAI approved by security. GPU quota not yet requested.
fields.integrationNotes: ClaimCenter exposes REST APIs (rate-limited); FNOL events available only via nightly batch export today, which conflicts with the real-time requirement.
fields.securityNotes: Purview classification rolled out to the DWH but not the claims core. No egress filtering on the current ML sandbox.
fields.recommendations: 1) Stand up an event stream from ClaimCenter FNOL (Event Hub). 2) Extend Purview coverage to claims core. 3) Request GPU/PTU quota for scoring latency headroom.
